title: Parliamentary | Michelle Welsh MP
meta_description: The latest Parliamentary updates from the Member of Parliament for Sherwood Forest.
text_excerpt: --> Parliamentary | Michelle Welsh MP top of page 0115 646 6219 MICHELLE WELSH MP About Help & Advice Updates Constituency Parliamentary In the News Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Parliament Watch my latest speeches here View my voting record here View my written questions here Newsletter - 16th February 2026 No.10 visit, Sherwood Forest Tourism debate, maternity services evidence hearing session Newsletter - 16th January 2026 Highlighting retail crime, standing up for farmers, writing to the Minister on WASPI Newsletter - 28th November 2025 Budget 2025, Meeting the Chancellor at N0.11, Constituent coach trip & tour of Parliament Newsletter - 18th July 2025 Secured a debate on Early Years providers, met with Education Secretary, 16 year olds given vote, met with Donna Ockenden Newsletter - 30th January 2026 Maternity APPG, business rates, PCOS policy, Royal College of Midwives Newsletter - 12th December 2025 BCSSS update, Backing British Farming, Petals Charity, 93% Club Newsletter - 14th November 2025 Make Birth Better, PMQs speech, school holiday debate, Hucknall Health Hub Minister meeting Sign up to my newsletter bottom of page
